statement: In every magma, Equation 804 (`x = y * (z * ((w * z) * w))`) implies Equation 2653 (`x = ((x * x) * (y * y)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0455
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w z) w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op x x) (op y y)) y)
